mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.device_code AS deviceCode, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.type_id AS typeId, c.install_location AS installLocation, c.ip_addr AS ipAddr, c.serial_no AS serialNo, c.channel_no AS channelNo, c.verify_code AS verifyCode, c.online_status::text AS onlineStatus, c.line_y AS lineY, c.roi, c.ref_width AS refWidth, c.ref_height AS refHeight FROM camera c WHERE c.serial_no IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(c.serial_no) <> '' ORDER BY c.id

SELECT id, device_code AS deviceCode, device_name AS deviceName, type_id AS typeId, install_location AS installLocation, ip_addr AS ipAddr, serial_no AS serialNo, channel_no AS channelNo, verify_code AS verifyCode, online_status::text AS onlineStatus, line_y AS lineY, roi, ref_width AS refWidth, ref_height AS refHeight FROM camera WHERE id = #{cameraId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO camera ( device_code, serial_no, channel_no, device_name, type_id, online_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceCode}, #{serialNo}, #{channelNo}, #{deviceName}, #{typeId}, 'offline', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE camera SET line_y = COALESCE(#{lineY}, line_y), roi = COALESCE(#{roi}, roi), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{cameraId}
UPDATE camera SET device_name = #{deviceName}, online_status = CAST(#{onlineStatus} AS camera_online_status), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{cameraId}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.device_code AS deviceCode, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.type_id AS typeId, t.type_name AS typeName, c.install_location AS installLocation, c.ip_addr AS ipAddr, c.serial_no AS serialNo, c.channel_no AS channelNo, c.verify_code AS verifyCode, c.online_status::text AS onlineStatus, c.line_y AS lineY, c.roi, c.ref_width AS refWidth, c.ref_height AS refHeight, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM camera c LEFT JOIN device_type t ON t.id = c.type_id
AND c.device_name LIKE concat('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
AND c.serial_no LIKE concat('%', #{serialNo}, '%')
AND c.device_code LIKE concat('%', #{deviceCode}, '%')
AND c.online_status::text = #{onlineStatus}
AND c.type_id = #{typeId}
ORDER BY c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.device_code AS deviceCode, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.type_id AS typeId, t.type_name AS typeName, c.install_location AS installLocation, c.ip_addr AS ipAddr, c.serial_no AS serialNo, c.channel_no AS channelNo, c.verify_code AS verifyCode, c.online_status::text AS onlineStatus, c.line_y AS lineY, c.roi, c.ref_width AS refWidth, c.ref_height AS refHeight, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM camera c LEFT JOIN device_type t ON t.id = c.type_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT id, device_name AS deviceName FROM camera WHERE device_name = #{deviceName} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, serial_no AS serialNo FROM camera WHERE serial_no = #{serialNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, device_code AS deviceCode FROM camera WHERE device_code = #{deviceCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO camera ( device_code, device_name, type_id, install_location, ip_addr, channel_no, serial_no, verify_code, online_status, line_y, roi, ref_width, ref_height, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{typeId}, #{installLocation}, #{ipAddr}, #{channelNo}, #{serialNo}, COALESCE(#{verifyCode}, ''), CAST(COALESCE(#{onlineStatus}, 'offline') AS camera_online_status), #{lineY}, #{roi}, COALESCE(#{refWidth}, 1920), COALESCE(#{refHeight}, 1080), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE camera SET device_code = #{deviceCode}, device_name = #{deviceName}, type_id = #{typeId}, install_location = #{installLocation}, ip_addr = #{ipAddr}, channel_no = #{channelNo}, serial_no = #{serialNo}, verify_code = COALESCE(#{verifyCode}, ''), online_status = CAST(COALESCE(#{onlineStatus}, 'offline') AS camera_online_status), line_y = #{lineY}, roi = #{roi}, ref_width = COALESCE(#{refWidth}, ref_width), ref_height = COALESCE(#{refHeight}, ref_height), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM camera WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM behavior_logs WHERE camera_id IN
#{id}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM presence_sessions WHERE camera_id IN
#{id}
